summary: Bridge-free reviewed the running det=1.25 MHz Ramsey autosave with 9 stored averages available. Used the first 8 averages for snake-order balance (400k/800k planned shots per point), found no scan-order-aware drift flags, no monitor error, no stop request, and performed no bridge queue mutation. Provisional readout2/self-baseline FFT target bins were direct 13C 0.27%, det-13C 0.99%, carrier 1.31%, det+13C 1.22%, old det=1 high/static 0.14%, static low 0.71%, previous 1.9 MHz 0.36%. No T2star or 13C claim was made; project state, evidence, lab log, and backlog were updated.

next_action.detail: Do not mutate the bridge queue while the job is running. Review a later useful even autosave subset bridge-free (for example 10/16, 12/16, 14/16), or perform terminal raw export/drift/plot/review when the job completes.
